description_long: This object is a historical-style cannon mounted on a wooden wheeled carriage. The cannon barrel is long, cylindrical, and made of dark metal, featuring ornate details near the breech and muzzle. The carriage is constructed from heavy wooden planks, reinforced with metal brackets and bolts, and is supported by four solid wheels, also reinforced with metal. The wheels are simple, round, and robust, designed to support the heavy weight of the cannon and allow for limited movement. The overall appearance is aged, with visible wear and patina on both the metal and wood surfaces. This type of vehicle would have been used in historical urban or battlefield settings for artillery purposes.
description: A large, dark metal cannon mounted on a sturdy wooden wheeled carriage with reinforced metal fittings and ornate barrel details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle of the cannon and the symmetrical arrangement of the wooden carriage and wheels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the cannon barrel, ornate details, and the rectangular wooden carriage with two visible wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the breech end of the cannon and the back of the wooden carriage, with all four wheels visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the cannon barrel and carriage, mirroring view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One fixed cannon barrel mounted centrally on the wooden carriage.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; surfaces are solid dark metal and wood.
